creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mfv from comment #5)
Thanks for the suggestions and we will see if it is possible to implement.  There was an issue in the newer version of rsync which prevents it can be restarted after being interrupted. And because all the architectures and branches pkg sets are out of date, it need some (more) time to catch up.  We're temporarily removing this mirror out of the pool and will add it again after it catches up.
